description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline with stages matching the DebOps role dependency levels: "DebOps roles (1st deps)", "DebOps roles (2nd deps)", "DebOps roles (3rd deps)", "DebOps roles (4th deps)" and "DebOps roles (no deps)". For each role job (ansible role, apache role, apt role, apt_cacher_ng role, apt_install role, apt_listchanges role, apt_mark role, apt_mirror role, apt_preferences role, apt_proxy role, atd role, auth role, authorized_keys role, avahi role, backup2l role, bind role, common playbook, console role, controller role, core role, cran role, cron role, cryptsetup role, cryptsetup/persistent_paths role, debconf role, debops_fact role, debops_legacy role, etc.) add the tags "shell" and "vagrant" (or "vagrant-vm" where specified), run the before_script "./lib/tests/jane gitlab before_script", the main script "./lib/tests/jane gitlab script", and the after_script "./lib/tests/jane gitlab after_script", set the role‑specific variables JANE_DIFF_PATTERN, JANE_LOG_PATTERN, JANE_INVENTORY_GROUPS, JANE_TEST_FACT and JANE_TEST_PLAY as defined, and declare any listed needs on prerequisite roles. No custom Docker image or services are defined, so the default runner image is used. The pipeline runs all jobs automatically on each pipeline execution.
